# Python Golden Fixture Manifest

All JSON/Markdown outputs in this directory are generated by `.opencode/artifacts/a3-faithful-calibrator/golden/gen_golden.py` by importing the canonical legacy Python modules from `D:\quailbot\src`. Do not hand-edit fixtures; re-run the generator.

| Fixture | Canonical branch pinned |
| --- | --- |
| `model_roi_normal.json` | `RoiDraft.to_json` base keys + tag split (`gui.py:33-60`). |
| `model_roi_negative_xy_empty_tags.json` | `RoiDraft.to_json` preserves negative `x/y`, drops empty tags (`gui.py:45-60`). |
| `model_roi_with_group.json` | `RoiDraft.to_json` emits `group` only when non-empty (`gui.py:55-60`). |
| `model_anchor_no_links.json` | `AnchorDraft.to_json` base keys, no link keys when empty (`gui.py:63-91`). |
| `model_anchor_with_links_tags_group.json` | `AnchorDraft.to_json` tags plus mirrored `linked_observables` and `linked_ROIs`, group (`gui.py:82-90`). |
| `model_group.json` | `GroupDraft.to_json`, `collapsed` omitted, tags/group conditionals (`gui.py:259-279`). |
| `cli_param_readable_only.json` | `CliParamDraft.to_json` parameter shape, `safety: null`, `actions.get` (`gui.py:171-256`). |
| `cli_param_writable_set_cmd_cleanup_raw.json` | Parameter raw passthrough, label emitted first, `value_arg`/`unit`/`value_type`/`snapshot_value`/`vals` cleanup, stale `linked_ROIs` removed (`gui.py:201-256`). |
| `cli_param_ramp_safety_enabled.json` | Parameter ramp action and safety dict present (`gui.py:224-233`). |
| `cli_param_linked_observables.json` | Parameter `linked_observables` emitted and stale link fields omitted (`gui.py:245-250`). |
| `cli_action_alwaysallowed.json` | Action shape, `alwaysallowed` normalized to `alwaysAllowed`, tags/group/links, remove `linked_ROIs` (`gui.py:175-199`, `357-363`). |
| `cli_action_blocked.json` | Action shape, `blocked` safety mode preserved (`gui.py:175-199`, `357-363`). |
| `cli_action_guarded_default.json` | Action shape, unrecognized safety mode defaults to `guarded` (`gui.py:175-199`, `357-363`). |
| `load_gui_wrapped.json` | Headless `_load_workspace_data` GUI wrapper body selection and ROI/anchor/group draft constructors (`gui.py:847-906`). |
| `parse_legacy_tools_cli.json` | `_parse_cli_parameter_drafts`: legacy `tools.cli`, item default-enabled true, `actions`, `action_commands` skips `count`/`items`, sort by label/name (`gui.py:473-529`). |
| `parse_cli_params_items.json` | `_parse_cli_params_block`: `cli_params` item lists, item default-enabled false, action item fallback description (`gui.py:560-630`, `412-430`). |
| `parse_cli_params_dict_fallback.json` | `_parse_cli_params_block`: dict-shaped parameter/action fallbacks skipping `count`/`items`, plus legacy `actions` object (`gui.py:580-628`). |
| `parse_links_tags_actions_description.json` | `_draft_from_parameter_item`: `linked_observables` preferred over `linked_ROIs`, scalar fallback links, list/scalar tags, `actions` overrides derived flags, action description fallback only when blank (`gui.py:387-470`, `366-384`). |
| `parse_bool_coercions.json` | `_parse_active` and `_parse_bool` coercions including bool/int/float/strings and `on/off` asymmetry (`gui.py:318-345`). |
| `load_missing_file.json` | `_load_workspace_raw` missing-file branch returns `rois`, `anchors`, `tools` with no `groups` key (`gui.py:282-284`). |
| `save_round_trip_preserves_unknown_gui.json` | Post-port save output preserves unknown top-level keys and mirrors visual arrays into an existing `GUI` block so load cannot prefer stale GUI data. |
| `save_round_trip_gui_wrapped_arrays.json` | GUI-wrapped round-trip regression: saved top-level and `GUI.*` visual arrays are identical after an edit. |
| `cli_import_merge.json` | `_merge_cli_param_drafts` identical skip + conflict, `_apply_cli_conflict_resolution` keep/use-loaded (`cli_import.py:112-174`). |
| `cli_import_conflict_report.md` | `_build_cli_conflict_report` markdown and sorted field-level diffs (`cli_import.py:180-231`). |
| `groups-filter/groups_descendants.json` | `_group_descendants` descendant traversal fixture, descendants-only output (`gui.py:1685-1694`). |
| `groups-filter/groups_display_options.json` | `_group_display_options` hierarchical sort/indent with excluded subtree omitted (`gui.py:1696-1717`). |
| `groups-filter/groups_cascade_active.json` | `_set_group_active` recursive cascade, including CLI `enabled` asymmetry (`gui.py:1719-1732`). |
| `groups-filter/groups_rename_cascade.json` | Group rename cascade over group/ROI/anchor/CLI `.group` references (`gui.py:2808-2820`). |
| `groups-filter/delete_items.json` | `_delete_selected_items` multi-select deletion, ROI link cleanup, reverse-index pop, group re-home (`gui.py:665-733`). |
| `groups-filter/filter_split_tags.json` | `_split_tags` comma split/strip/drop-empty (`gui.py:1568-1569`). |
| `groups-filter/filter_terms.json` | `_filter_terms` comma split/strip/lowercase (`gui.py:1637-1641`). |
| `groups-filter/filter_item_match.json` | `_item_matches_filter` and `_match_terms` tag/keyword AND/OR semantics (`gui.py:1643-1683`). |
| `groups-filter/filter_subtree_visibility.json` | `_refresh_list` subtree visibility: group visible if self or descendant item/group matches (`gui.py:1392-1403`). |

Instrument-specific acceptance evidence is generated separately under `.opencode/artifacts/a3-faithful-calibrator/golden/real-workspace/` and is intentionally untracked.
